command:

BASE='/home/jose/.local/share/moreno-unified-delegator/moreno_hub'

echo '=== submit Popen block (lines 1580-1605) ==='
ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -i $KEY jose@192.168.0.205     "sed -n '1580,1605p' $BASE/core.py" 2>&1

echo '=== DelegationRunner.run (lines 1329-1400) ==='
ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -i $KEY jose@192.168.0.205     "sed -n '1329,1400p' $BASE/core.py" 2>&1

echo DONE_1946
